title: Flutter Flavorizr Configuration Schema
description: JSON Schema for flutter_flavorizr configuration fields (typically used in flavorizr.yaml)

app.description: An object describing the general capabilities of an app

flavorDimensions.description: The value of the flavorDimensions in the android build.gradle file

resValues.description: An object which contains a set of resValues configurations

buildConfigFields.description: An object which contains a set of buildConfigFields configurations

flavors.description: An object (dictionary) where each key is a flavor name and the value describes a flavor configuration

instructions.description: An array of instructions to customize the flavorizr process

assetsUrl.description: A string containing the URL of the zip assets file. The default points to the current release

ide.description: The IDE in which the app is being developed. Currently only vscode or idea

icon.description: The icon path for this flavor

applicationId.description: The applicationId of the Android App

resValues.description: An array/object which contains a set of resValues configurations

buildConfigFields.description: An array/object which contains a set of buildConfigFields configurations

customConfig.description: An array/object which contains a set of custom configs, overrides defaultConfig

generateDummyAssets.description: True if you want to generate dummy assets (icon set, strings, etc)

icon.description: The icon path for this android flavor

adaptiveIcon.description: An object which contains foreground, background, monochrome (optional) of adaptive icon

bundleId.description: The bundleId of the iOS App

buildSettings.description: A flavor-specific XCode build configuration dictionary

variables.description: An array/object which contains a set of variables configurations

generateDummyAssets.description: True if you want to generate dummy assets (xcassets, etc)

icon.description: The icon path for this iOS flavor

bundleId.description: The bundleId of the macOS App

buildSettings.description: A flavor-specific XCode build configuration dictionary

variables.description: An array/object which contains a set of variables configurations

generateDummyAssets.description: True if you want to generate dummy assets (xcassets, etc)

icon.description: The icon path for this macOS flavor

type.description: The type of the resValue variable

value.description: The value of the resValue variable

type.description: The type of the buildConfigField variable

value.description: The value of the buildConfigField variable

target.description: The type of the target (debug, release, profile). Do not specify a target if you want to apply it to all of them.

config.description: The path to the Firebase configuration file
The path to the AGConnect configuration file
